2606.24387.title: AutoSpecNER: A Fine-Grained Named Entity Recognition Dataset for Vehicle Specification Extraction
2606.24387.paper_summary: Vehicle advertisements contain rich specification information, but automotive NER resources remain limited. We introduce AutoSpecNER, an expert-annotated dataset for fine-grained entity recognition in vehicle listings. The dataset includes 659 advertisements from a popular car-selling website, with over 10,000 entities annotated across 15 categories, including MODEL, ENGINE_SPEC, and BATTERY_CAPACITY. Annotation quality was validated through inter-annotator agreement, achieving an average score of 91.5%. We benchmark rule-based extraction, fine-tuned transformer encoders, and large language models. DeBERTa achieves the best performance with a 90% micro-F1 score, outperforming the rule-based baseline (43%) and the strongest large language model (77.8%).
2606.24387.paper_summary_zh: 車輛廣告包含豐富的規格信息，但汽車命名實體識別資源仍然有限。我們介紹了 AutoSpecNER，一個專家標註的數據集，用於車輛列表中的細粒度實體識別。該數據集包括來自一個受歡迎的汽車銷售網站的 659 條廣告，標註了超過 10,000 個實體，涵蓋 15 個類別，包括 MODEL、ENGINE_SPEC 和 BATTERY_CAPACITY。通過標註者之間的一致性驗證了標註質量，平均得分達到 91.5%。我們對基於規則的提取、微調的Transformer編碼器和大型語言模型進行了基準測試。DeBERTa 以 90% 的微 F1 分數達到最佳表現，超越了基於規則的基線（43%）和最強大的大型語言模型（77.8%）。
2606.24387.author: Jordan Lee et.al.
2606.24387.authors: Jordan Lee, Filippos Ventirozos, Abdirahman Abdullahm, Ioanna Nteka, Peter Appleby, Matthew Shardlow
